title: Device Settings - Do Not Disturb
scenario: Do Not Disturb toggle in Device Settings controls headset LED behavior with red blinking when enabled and Wear Sensor is off
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on your Android device.
2. Navigate to the Home screen and tap on the connected [Device Name].
4. Locate the Do Not Disturb (DND) tab in the Device Settings menu.
5. Verify that the DND tab is present and can be expanded by tapping on it.
6. After expanding, verify that a toggle switch and the description text are displayed: "Enable the indicator on your headset to inform others that you are not to be interrupted."
7. Ensure Wear Sensor is turned off (Device Settings → Wear Sensor → toggle OFF).
8. Tap the DND toggle to switch it ON.
9. Observe the headset LEDs — they should blink red.
10. Tap the DND toggle to switch it OFF.
11. Observe the headset LEDs — they should turn off.
expected: The DND tab is present and expandable, showing a toggle and the correct description. When toggled ON (with Wear Sensor OFF), the headset LEDs blink red. When toggled OFF, the LEDs turn off.
